title: Appeal for Onesimus
summary_text: Paul prisoner of Christ and Timothy write to Philemon beloved fellow worker with Apphia Archippus and house church—grace peace. Thanks love faith toward Lord and saints. Paul appeals for Onesimus once unprofitable now profitable both—receive as beloved brother; confident obedience; prepare guest room; grace Lord Jesus.
key_points: I thank my God always, making mention of you in my prayers.
hearing of your love and toward the Lord Jesus.
I appeal to you for my child, Onesimus.
who once was unprofitable to you, but now is profitable to you and to me.
receive him, that is, my own heart.
if he has wronged you at all, or owes you anything, put that to my account.
evidence_phrases: your love … toward the Lord Jesus
I appeal to you for my child, Onesimus
once was unprofitable … now is profitable
receive him, that is, my own heart
The grace of our Lord Jesus Christ be with your spirit
